title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 385.080 - Credit life, accident and health insurance must be placed directly in companies holding a certificate of authority to do business in this state
text:
385.080.  Credit life, accident and health insurance must be placed directly in companies holding a certificate of authority to do business in this state. — Credit life and credit accident and health insurance may be written or issued in Missouri only when placed directly in insurance companies duly granted certificate of authority to do such business in this state
(L. 1977 H.B. 610 § 15)
